title: Slope & Linear Equations
learningOutcomes: Master the core principles of Slope & Linear Equations.

objectives.text: Adjust the slope of line AB to exactly 1.0 (45 degrees angle).

theory: Slope (m) is the ratio of vertical change (rise) to horizontal change (run): m = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1). Parallel lines have equal slopes (m1 = m2). Perpendicular lines have slopes that multiply to -1 (m1 * m2 = -1).

tasks.instruction: Adjust the slope of line AB to exactly 1.0 (45 degrees angle).

observationPrompts: How did coordinates react during drag movements?
